name: obsidian-cli
description: CLI tool for interacting with Obsidian vaults — search, read, and create notes from the terminal.

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read a note's contents as markdown

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new note with content from stdin

use_cases: Retrieve relevant notes from a user's knowledge base
Save conversation summaries or research results to Obsidian
Search for prior context before answering questions
agent_metadata.example_workflow: obsidian-cli search 'project requirements' | head -5 && obsidian-cli read 'Projects/current-spec.md'
